headline: Starboard Delivers Letter to Lamb Weston
summary: NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Starboard Value LP (together with its affiliates, "Starboard"), a significant stockholder of Lamb Weston Holdings Inc. ("Lamb Weston" or the "Company") (NYSE: LW), today announced that it has delivered a letter to Michael Smith, the Company’s Chief Executive Officer, with a copy to the Company’s Board of Directors.

content.title: Starboard Delivers Letter to Lamb Weston
content.summary: NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Starboard Value LP (together with its affiliates, "Starboard"), a significant stockholder of Lamb Weston Holdings Inc. ("Lamb Weston" or the "Company") (NYSE: LW), today announced that it has delivered a letter to Michael Smith, the Company’s Chief Executive Officer, with a copy to the Company’s Board of Directors.

headline: Starboard Pressure Puts Lamb Weston Cost Cuts And Valuation In Focus
summary: Starboard Value LP, a significant shareholder in Lamb Weston Holdings, has urged the company to double its announced cost savings program. The activist investor is also pressing NYSE:LW to review its international portfolio, including possible asset divestitures. The company’s leadership is under pressure to assess whether its current structure and global footprint remain the best fit for shareholders. Lamb Weston Holdings, trading at around $46.03, has seen mixed share performance, with an...
